name: Bibs Soles' Haroset
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sweet kosher wine; for Passover or more
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and core the apples.
2. Cut the apples into quarters.
3. Chop the apples in a food processor until finely grated.
4. Transfer the grated apples to a bowl and stir in lemon juice, if using.
5. Add nuts to the food processor and chop until finely chopped but with a few small chunks of nuts.
6. Stir the chopped nuts into the apples.
7. Gradually add wine (a few tablespoons at a time) to the mixture until it resembles a paste. If making ahead, you may need to add more wine as the mixture thickens slightly when standing.
Makes: about 2 cups
